_comment: Claim-fidelity spec for the handoff skill, DEFAULT scenario (chunked_routing). handoff ships a deterministic planner (`plan_handoff_run.py`) whose `_required_reads` are INTENT-keyed and mutually exclusive: chunked_routing -> chunked-routing.md; pickup -> workflow-trigger.md + continuation-sequence.md; refresh -> state-selection.md + spill-targets.md; adapter-contract.md is read only when the adapter is missing/warned/invalid. The old fixture's RCF was the UNION of all intents and so false-failed every real run (no single intent opens all of them); per lens 4 the skill is split into one scenario per intent, each with its planner-derived RCF (lens 1). This default scenario is the bare `/charness:handoff`: `should_fire_chunker` fires on the plugin-namespaced invocation (a chunker fix shipped with this calibration made `/charness:handoff` register as the handoff command rather than 'another slash command', so the bare namespaced call deterministically resolves to chunked_routing), whose only required read is chunked-routing.md. Every other reference is on-demand here (read under a different intent or condition). declaredReferences is the full set (coverage). referenceEngagement uses the engage-always/on-demand/gate-sufficient axis from the methodology contract (charness-artifacts/spec/2026-06-23-skill-claim-fidelity-doc-philosophy.md). thresholds omitted until a baseline capture sets a budget.

adapter-contract.md.rationale: The planner reads this only when the adapter is missing, warned, or invalid; a healthy repo resolves the artifact location from the resolved adapter without opening the explainer doc.
adapter-contract.md.trigger: adapter is missing, warned, or invalid (planner _required_reads condition)

chunked-routing.md.rationale: For the chunked_routing intent (bare/namespaced invocation with no task directive) this is the planner's single UNCONDITIONAL required read: it owns the deterministic trigger rule and the backlog-routing pipeline the run must follow before any pickup.

continuation-sequence.md.rationale: A pickup-intent planner read; not opened on a chunked_routing run.
continuation-sequence.md.trigger: pickup intent — ordering the next move as continuation rather than history

document-seams.md.rationale: Addresses portability when a repo already uses a checked-in handoff surface; the adapter handles the default path otherwise.
document-seams.md.trigger: repo has a pre-existing checked-in handoff surface that should override the default location

spill-targets.md.rationale: A refresh-intent planner read; not opened on a chunked_routing run.
spill-targets.md.trigger: refresh intent — spilling durable detail to its owning artifact instead of growing a diary

state-selection.md.rationale: A refresh/judge-intent planner read; not opened on a chunked_routing run.
state-selection.md.trigger: refresh intent — keeping only state that changes the next action

workflow-trigger.md.rationale: A pickup/judge-intent planner read; not opened on a chunked_routing run.
workflow-trigger.md.trigger: pickup intent — starting from the named workflow trigger
